title: KP-PVP
description: Ultimate kitpvp plugin with multi-world support
body:
Hello everyone

Im here to provide you with one of the most popular and best kitpvp plugins here on Modrinth

**KP-PVP is a plugin that will help your players get better at Minecraft PvP whilst having fun! The features it offers will make sure your players are enjoying their battles against their foes! I really hope you like this plugin as I have put so much effort into it!**

REQUIRES: [https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/kpcore.105829/](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/kpcore.105829/)

**FEATURES**

* LOTS of customisability
* Top Kills (Need DecentHolograms and ProtocolLib)
* Shop System with built-in economy with admin commands
* Join, death and kit titles + All titles are customisable
* You can list all commands with one simple command (/kphelp).
* SlimeBlocks push players frontward and gives them default kit if they dont have selected one
* Ability to block any commands to prevent your players escaping combat! (Only active when they are in KitPVP)
* Built-IN ScoreBoard system included!
* This plugin has been extensively tested on a local host server to ensure that it is bug free, if you do find any however, send me a message and I will work at resolving it ASAP!
* Completely free plugin and Open Source
* Very customisable KillStreak system!
* Custom 1v1 system built-in
* Has a click tester, see how many times you can click within a set amount of time!
* A command to change the spawn point after a player has died.
* Modifiable kit descriptions.
* Soup signs/Join signs/Leave signs
* Multiworld support.
* Warps System! The plugin has four warps (fps , 1v1,sumo and lava challenge)
* Sponges acts as launchpads!
* Messages file which allows for majority of messages to be customised!
* PlaceHolderAPI Support!
* Anti Command Spam. Players cannot do the command /kitpvp join twice if they are already on kitpvp. To teleport to kit pvp spawn and reset your kit use /kitclear
* You can view your or other player statistics by a Command
* You can use the command /adminmode to be enable Vanish mode and use special tools supplied to catch cheaters!
* Staff only chat so Staff can talk in game without players knowing!
* The players cannot break or place blocks while in game unless they have permission
* Has a beautiful shop and kit menu with various beautifuls unicodes
* You can edit the amount of coins thats player win or loose on kill and death
* +300 KB of pure and high quality code
* You can disable the FullIron in the kits and make them without armor and stone sword via a config option
* SoupHeal included (Soups heals 3.5 hearts)
* You can enable bungeemode to make players automaticaly join kitpvp and prevents them to leave
* Level UP System! You can kill players to levelup from level 0 to level infinite!
* When you shot a arrow in a player the plugin sends a message to you telling how much health he have
* Vips and Staff receives doublecoins and doublexp via permission node!

**COMMANDS**
* /kitpvp join Join the kitpvp - NONE
* /kitpvp info Display the plugin info and credits - NONE
* /kitpvp clear Clear your kit and return to the kitpvp spawn - kitpvp.kitclear
* /kitpvp kits Open the kit menu (The Kit menu can be opened too with your item received when you join the kitpvp)
* /kitpvp shop Open the shop menu (The Shop menu can be opened too with your item received when you join the kitpvp)
* /kitpvp leave Leave the kitpvp - NONE
* /kitpvp update (Tell you if the plugin have a new Version and how to update it) - kitpvp.admin
* /kphelp Displays the full commands list - NONE
* /skit create (kitname) - create a kit with the items in your inventory) - kitpvp.skit
* /skit apply (kitname) (range) - apply the kit to the players in a range - kitpvp.skit
* /kitcredits Display the credits and plugin information - NONE
* /ksc A Custom Staff Chat to you talk with your staff - kitpvp.staffchat
* /kpsetspawn Set the kitpvp spawn - kitpvp.setspawn
* /kpsetdeathspawn If you want to change the player death spawn use this command - 
* /kpeditmode Allows you to make changes to kitpvp arena - kitpvp.editmode
* /set1v1 spawn,loc1,loc2 Set the 1v1 spawn and players positions - kitpvp.set1v1
* /setsumo spawn,loc1,loc2 Set the sumo spawn and players positions - kitpvp.setsumo
* /givecoins <nick> <amount> Give players coins - kitpvp.coins
* /removecoins <nick> <amount> Remove players coins - kitpvp.coins
* /paycoins <nick> <amount. - Pay coins to someone
* /coins View your coins
* /kpkills give <Player> <Amount> Give Player kills - kitpvp.givekills
* /kpkills remove <Player> <Amount> Remove Player kills - kitpvp.givekills
* /kpkickall Forces all players to leave the kitpvp - kitpvp.kpkickall
* /adminmode Enter in admin mode to catch hackers - kitpvp.adminmode
* /kitreload Reload the configuration file - kitpvp.kitreload
* /kitclear Clear your kit and teleports you to the kitpvp spawn - kitpvp.kitclear
* /kpkits (Alias to /kitpvp kits) - NONE
* /kpshop (Alias to /kitpvp shop) - NONE
* /stats <PlayerName> View your or other players stats

**EXTRA PERMISSIONS**

kitpvp.createsigns - Allow to create join,leave or soup signs
kitpvp.stats.see.other - Allow to see other player stats
kitpvp.kit.<kitname> - Allow you to use a kit ex: kitpvp.kit.stomper
kitpvp.kit.* - Allow you to use all kits
kitpvp.unblockedcmds - Allows you to use blocked cmds while in kitpvp
kitpvp.doublecoins - Receives Doubled Coins
kitpvp.doublexp - Receives Doubled XP

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/ROdZbs0Gma4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


**INSTALLATION INSTRUCTIONS**


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

* Download the plugin and put the plugin in your plugins server folder and make sure that your server is Spigot 1.8 or greater and have any permission plugin installed. and dont forget to install decentholograms and protocollib
* Install KP-CORE and put MYSQL info on its configuration
* (Optional) Install PlaceHolderAPI plugin
Stop the Server and Start it Again
* (Optional) Configure the config.yml what you likes and do /kitreload
Ensure your KitPVP map is ready and set the spawn for it using /kpsetspawn
* (Optional) If you want to change the player death spawn on kitpvp set it with /kpsetdeathspawn
* (Optional) BUILD A 1V1 MAP
* (Optional) Set the 1v1 spawn with /set1v1 spawn
* (Optional) Set the first player position with /set1v1 loc1
* (Optional) Set the second player position with /set1v1 loc2
* CREATE A JOIN SIGN OR JOIN THE GAME WITH THE COMMAND /kitpvp join and if you want to join the 1v1 write /kitpvp 1v1 (you need to join on kitpvp first)
* Set the topkills with /settopkills
* (Optional) Set the location to players teleport after chooshing a kit with /setarena (1|4)
* (Optional) Set the warp fps and lavachallenge with /kpsetwarp (fps , challenge)
* (Optional) BUILD A SUMO MAP
* (Optional) Set the sumo spawn with /setsumo spawn
* (Optional) Set the first player position with /setsumo loc1
* (Optional) Set the second player position with /setsumo loc2
ENJOY!

</details>



This plugin use bStats to collect information about servers using it
View the current statistics here https://bstats.org/plugin/bukkit/KP-PVP
